description: Extended routing tests — hard cases for skill card trigger optimization

categories.multi_domain_ambiguity: Messages that reference multiple domains — tests which signal wins
categories.colloquial_slang: Informal language that should still route correctly
categories.negation: Messages that negate one domain — should route to the intended one
categories.compound_requests: Multi-step requests — tests which action is primary

tests.message: Save my meeting notes as a task
Write up the research and save it to drive
tests.note: save to drive = files, even though research could be queue

tests.message: Remind me to check twitter tomorrow
tests.note: remind = tasks intent, twitter is content

tests.message: Schedule a call with the person I met at the conference
Add a note about the meeting with Sarah
Find what Jake tweeted about our integration
Queue up a draft tweet about the product launch
tests.note: queue = queue intent, draft tweet is the task content

tests.message: Look up the file I saved about the team contact list
yo drop that in my notes
nah skip the meeting
lemme see what's poppin on the timeline
bruh who even is this guy
aight throw that on my list
can you just bang out that report real quick
tests.note: bang out a report = delegate to queue

tests.message: Don't add this to my calendar, just note it
tests.note: negation of calendar + note intent = second-brain

tests.message: I don't need a reminder, just look it up
tests.note: negation of reminder + look up = second-brain

tests.message: Not a task, more of a research question
This isn't for twitter, save it as a document
Check twitter and add a task about what you find
tests.note: twitter check is primary, task is secondary

tests.message: Search my vault and then draft a summary for the team
Look at my schedule and tell me when I can do deep work
Find my notes on the topic and queue a research deep dive
tests.note: notes lookup first, then queue — notes has more triggers

tests.message: Who was at the meeting and what did we discuss?
tests.note: who = people intent, meeting is context

tests.message: Check if the API integration is working and file a task if not
bookmark this
what's the word on the street
jot this down for me
ping Jake about the deliverable
offload this to someone
is everything hooked up properly
